title: Small Things
description: A little mod that adds vanilla-like armors and tools.
body:
# Small Things
A little vanilla like mod that adds 2 new sets of armor :
- A mithril one that sits between diamond and netherite in terms of stats.
- A orichalcum one that is an upgrade for netherite.

And the according tools :
- The mithril ones sit between diamond and netherite in terms of stats except the sword and axe who both have an enhanced attack speed.
- The orichalcum ones are superior to netherite but don't have the attack speed boost.

And finally a little structure, the Mine.

_You can use it in any private or public modpack._
